Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Consume]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — The Consume technique allows a user to no longer need advancement resources by using enemies instead.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Consume is a technique Lindon could master to feed Dross.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — The principles of the original Consume technique help Lindon's development process.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Consume is a technique Lindon hopes to get working.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — The Consume technique allows Lindon to turn enemies into spiritual elixirs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon has a Consume technique that allows him to steal power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Consume is a technique used by Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — The Consume technique is in Lindon's arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Lindon used the Consume technique to suck away strength from the Remnant.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 20''' — Lindon uses the Consume technique on the Wandering Titan.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 16''' — Lindon attempted to use his Consume technique on Reigan Shen's attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — The Consume technique is a basic use of hunger madra that acts like a fire binding to burn things.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon began to Consume.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon used the Consume technique when he first started.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Consume is a technique associated with Northstrider.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Lindon began to Consume scales from the dragon's lip.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — The Consume technique can be used to weaken the dragon's breath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — Consume is a technique used to retrieve memories from the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — Lindon kept his energy up by Consuming the attacks from his enemies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Consume is a basic technique.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
